name: exam2pdf: Administrator Setup
description: Guides administrators through the initial configuration of the PDF certificate plugin.

steps.title: Welcome to PDF Certificate Settings
steps.content:
This is where you configure how PDF certificates are generated after quiz attempts.

All settings defined here serve as global defaults. Teachers can override them per quiz.

steps.title: When are PDFs generated?
steps.content:
On submission (automatic) creates the PDF immediately when a student finishes a quiz.

On demand only creates it when a teacher clicks the download button — useful for high-traffic quizzes.

steps.title: Which attempts get a PDF?
steps.content:
Passed only requires the attempt to meet the quiz pass grade (set in the Gradebook).

All finished generates a PDF for every completed attempt, regardless of score.

steps.title: How are PDFs delivered?
steps.content:
Choose Download (button on the review page), Email (automatic notification), or Both.

You can also configure extra email recipients below — the learner always receives a copy.

steps.title: Retention & Cleanup
steps.content:
PDFs are stored for the configured number of days. After that, a nightly task deletes them automatically.

Set to 0 to keep PDFs indefinitely.

steps.title: You're all set!
steps.content: Save these settings and you're ready to go. Teachers can fine-tune settings per quiz via Quiz → Settings → PDF Certificate settings.
